fields.customfield_12359: Add UPA Rear /Front R158 configuration in Confighub
fields.customfield_13538: This ticket type "New request" is obsolete! Please change the ticket type above ↑
fields.summary: Add UPA Rear /Front R158 configuration in Confighub

comments.body:
Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ157] ,

Cc: [~LGEJ-LGEJ707] ,

According to requirement ([^F-N01-01_Sonar_V3.2.5.doc]), we need to add value *UPA Rear /Front R158* of config *CNF_HMI_ADAS_UPA_Visual* for Sonar service.
!image-2026-03-30-17-11-42-986.png!

But as we check in config hub on latest event version, there is no available value for *UPA Rear /Front R158* of config *CNF_HMI_ADAS_UPA_Visual.* 

Could you process to add value *UPA Rear /Front R158* to the config {*}CNF_HMI_ADAS_UPA_Visual{*}?
Thank you.

Dear [~TTC02144] san,

From Sonar requirement, they request a new value for *CNF_HMI_ADAS_UPA_Visual,*

curently in DRF 2.7.1, we only support values below

0:UPA not present
1:UPA Rear
2:UPA Rear/Front

Could you kindly discuss with Nisan Sonar's FO to provide new value for *CNF_HMI_ADAS_UPA_Visual* and release new DRF version?

Thank you

bocao

Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ672] san,

Cc- [~N195178] san, [~N207423] san, [~STF01306] san,

We have received the request from the FO and currently working on it, but the release date is yet to be determined.

Thank you,

Shilpa.

Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ672] san,
CC: [~N196317] san, [~TTC02160] san,
I confirmed that the new DRF is scheduled to be released around May.

Dear [~LGEJ-LGEJ1028] 

Because the DRF release date haven't determined yet, so I temporarily set the plan to end of PI30, PI30.04.03

Thanks
